---
title: "GATCongress replication manifest"
author: "Jacob Crainic"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: false
---

# Replication manifest

This document is the single entry point that re-runs every analysis behind
the paper. It is paired with `Dockerfile` and `run_all.sh` for full
reproducibility. Each chunk below corresponds to one stage in the pipeline.

## Environment

```{bash}
#| label: env
bash run_all.sh --skip-install
```

If running outside Docker, install dependencies first:

```{bash}
#| label: install-py
uv pip install --system -r requirements.txt
```

```{bash}
#| label: install-r
Rscript replication/scripts/install_r_packages.R
```

## Stage 1 — Data acquisition

```{bash}
#| label: data
python3 data/download_voteview.py
python3 data/download_ep_data.py
python3 src/build_district_features.py
```

## Stage 2 — Spectral analysis and BLI

```{bash}
#| label: spectral
python3 src/spectral_analysis.py
python3 src/weighted_spectral.py
python3 src/bli_brute_force.py
python3 src/bli_regression.py
```

## Stage 3 — Theoretical verification

```{bash}
#| label: theorems
python3 src/bli_theorem_verification.py
python3 src/bli_proof_verification.py
python3 src/sbm_concentration_verify.py --scale large
python3 src/bli_clt_verify.py --scale large
python3 src/sbm_benchmark_brev.py --scale large
```

## Stage 4 — Causal identification

```{bash}
#| label: causal
python3 src/cohort_ddd.py
python3 src/staggered_did.py
python3 src/honest_did.py
python3 src/mediation_analysis.py
python3 src/death_in_office.py
python3 src/senate_analysis.py
python3 src/freshman_cohort_analysis.py
```

## Stage 5 — R-based DiD comparators and sensitivity

```{bash}
#| label: r-did
Rscript src/did_comparator.R results/mediation_panel.csv results/did_comparator.json
Rscript src/fect_placebo.R
Rscript src/specr_curve.R
Rscript src/rdit_close_margins.R results/mediation_panel.csv results/rdit.json
Rscript src/iv_redistricting.R results/mediation_panel.csv results/iv.json
Rscript src/sdid_bicameral.R results/senate_panel.csv results/sdid.json
Rscript src/interflex_gerrymandering.R
Rscript src/interference_death.R
Rscript src/causalweight_mediation.R
Rscript src/bayes_factor_dfbetas.R
```

## Stage 6 — Robustness battery

```{bash}
#| label: robust
python3 src/negative_controls.py
python3 src/placebo_loocv.py
python3 src/null_model_analysis.py
python3 src/counterfactual_sensitivity.py
python3 src/recovery_threshold_sensitivity.py
python3 src/sensitivity_sweep.py
python3 src/vote_filtering.py
python3 src/centrality_comparison.py
```

## Stage 7 — Cross-national transfer

```{bash}
#| label: ep
python3 src/ep_bli_all_terms.py
```

## Stage 8 — Figures and tables

```{bash}
#| label: figures
python3 src/generate_figures.py
python3 src/skeleton_network.py
python3 src/alluvial_data_prep.py
Rscript src/alluvial_coalitions.R
```

## Stage 9 — Compile paper

```{bash}
#| label: paper
cd paper && tectonic paper.tex
```

## Stage 10 — Snapshot environment for replication

```{bash}
#| label: snapshot
Rscript -e 'renv::snapshot(prompt = FALSE)'
uv lock
```
